name: lecstor-claude-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugins — shared subagent configurations and workflow tooling.

plugins.name: context-management
plugins.description: Subagent set for context isolation — coder, docs-lookup, test-runner, review, browser. Includes delegation rules to keep large tool outputs out of the main agent's context window.

plugins.name: task-loop
plugins.description: Drive a project's task list unattended — task-worker subagent completes one task end-to-end (implement, validate, commit, archive); a coordinator skill picks the next task, dispatches the worker, self-verifies, and loops. Designed for overnight runs where every step is a local commit.
